name: ETHAN DEAL
heroParagraphs: I'm currently a senior at Duke Kunshan University studying Computation and Design.
In my free time, I like to play sports (Ultimate Frisbee and Soccer), music (Piano and Guitar), and eat (food).
While you're here, take a look at some of my work experience and personal projects. This site is a work in progress, so check back later for updates!
